---
name: "🚀🆕 Enhancement  Request"
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Hackathon Chronicles
Title: ''
labels: "Type: Enhancement"
assignees: ''

---

# **🚀 Enhancement  Request**

## **Is your Enhancement  request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. 
For example: "I'm always frustrated when [describe problem]."

---

## **Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. 
For example: "I would like the ability to [describe the Enhancement  or improvement] so that [benefits]."

---

## **Describe alternatives you've considered**
If applicable, describe any alternative solutions or enhancements you've considered.
For example: "I considered using [alternative solution], but it does not work because [reason]."

---

## **Additional context**
Add any other context, examples, or screenshots about the Enhancement  request here. This could include:
- Design mockups or wireframes (if any)
- Use cases and how this Enhancement  will improve user experience
- Any related discussions or resources (e.g., links to articles, existing issues, etc.)

---

## **Would you like to contribute to this Enhancement ?**
If you would like to help implement this Enhancement, feel free to open a pull request or provide suggestions!
- [ ] Yes, I can help implement this Enhancement 
- [ ] No, I just want to suggest it

---

## **Priority** 
Please provide a rough priority for this Enhancement  request. 
- [ ] Low priority (Nice to have)
- [ ] Medium priority (Should have)
- [ ] High priority (Must have)
